/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -fPIC  -shared -Wl,-soname,libgo2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libgo2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/go2_interface/msg/detail/camera_gimbal_cmd__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/go2_interface/srv/detail/camera_mode__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/go2_interface/srv/detail/go2_modes__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/go2_interface/srv/detail/go2_light__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/go2_interface/srv/detail/go2_volume__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/foxy/lib: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
